sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking on the yellow square did nothing (board_changed: false). I've tried clicking on almost everything and nothing seems to work. Let me think about this more carefully.
I've used 19 actions so far. The target is about 42. I need to be more strategic.
Let me reconsider the game. In level 1, the mechanic was:
1. There was a path of gray dots
2. Clicking on dots in order moved a purple agent along the path
3. The goal was to reach the target
In level 2:
1. There are 4 colored palette squares (S, M, p, Y)
2. There's a blue circular shape
3. There are 4 magenta 2×2 squares (from clicked dots)
4. There's a yellow 4×4 square
Wait, maybe the game is about clicking on the magenta squares in a specific order to "collect" them, similar to how I clicked on gray dots in level 1. But I tried clicking on magenta squares and nothing happened.
Actually, let me reconsider. In level 1, I clicked on the gray dots (path elements), not on the purple agent. The agent moved automatically when I clicked on the next dot in the path. Maybe in level 2, I need to click on the magenta squares in a specific order, and the blue shape will move to collect them.
But I tried clicking on magenta squares and nothing happened. Unless I need to click on them in a specific order.
Let me think about the spatial arrangement of the magenta squares:
- Node 9: [36-37, 17-18] (left-middle)
- Node 10: [36-37, 40-41] (right-middle)
- Node 11: [55-56, 46-47] (right-bottom)
- Node 12: [56-57, 15-16] (left-bottom)
The blue shape is at [23-31, 29-37] (center).
Maybe the order is:
1. Click on Node 9 (left-middle) - closest to blue shape on the left
2. Click on Node 10 (right-middle) - closest to blue shape on the right
3. Click on Node 12 (left-bottom) - next closest
4. Click on Node 11 (right-bottom) - farthest
Or maybe the order is clockwise or counterclockwise.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the initial state. The 8 sky blue dots were at:
- [37, 18], [37, 41], [40, 37], [41, 16], [54, 49], [55, 14], [56, 47], [57, 16]
When I clicked on dots, they turned magenta. When I clicked on the blue shape, 2 dots disappeared. So the blue shape "consumed" 2 dots.
Maybe the game is:
1. Click on dots to "activate" them (turn them magenta)
2. Click on the blue shape to "collect" the activated dots
3. The goal is to collect all dots
But I already clicked on the blue shape and only 2 dots disappeared. And clicking on it again doesn't do anything.
Hmm, let me try a completely different approach. Maybe I need to click on the magenta squares to "deactivate" them (turn them back to sky blue or make them disappear), and the goal is to clear all magenta squares.
Let me try clicking on one of the magenta squares again.
